title: [InstCombine][profcheck] Fix missing branch data in InstCombineCompares.cpp
author: alanzhao1
description:
These are trivial fixes where we create a new select instruction with the same conditional as an existing select.

Tracking issue: #147390

tests.test_body:
define i1 @icmp_select_var_commuted(i8 %x, i8 %y, i8 %_z) {
  %z = udiv i8 42, %_z
  %cmp1 = icmp eq i8 %x, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cmp1, i8 %z, i8 %y
  %cmp2 = icmp eq i8 %z, %sel
  ret i1 %cmp2
}
